response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:18: Three performers (Noel, Pekora, Subaru) perform 'Edison'. Title 'エジソン' on screen. 2. Performer: Shirogane Noel, Usada Pekora, Oozora Subaru. Original Artist: Wednesday Campanella. 3. 02:18-04:39: Shirogane Noel performs 'ours'. Credits on screen. 4. Performer: Shirogane Noel. Original Artist: Furukawa Honpo. 5. Lyrics for both songs found via search tool.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a musical performance celebrating Shirogane Noel's 2025 birthday. The first part is an upbeat song, 'Edison', performed by Shirogane Noel, Usada Pekora, and Oozora Subaru. The second part is an acoustic piano version of the song 'ours', performed solo by Shirogane Noel.

scenes.description: The VTubers Shirogane Noel, Usada Pekora, and Oozora Subaru perform the song 'Edison' together on a stage. Text overlays indicate the song title 'エジソン' and the event '#白銀ノエル生誕祭2025'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Shirogane Noel, Usada Pekora, Oozora Subaru

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
If I have time to dance, I want to invent
If I have time to sing, I want to invent
I want to kick away live bookings and invent
I will become such an inventor king
If I have time to dance, I want to invent
If I have time to sing, I want to invent
I want to kick away live bookings and invent
I will become such an inventor king

Dancing Edison self-esteem
Singing Edison self-respect
Dancing Edison self-esteem
Singing Edison self-respect

Since my childhood
The music I listened to at home was house music
I listened to subscription playlists
If I dug up songs, I was a DJ at the club
If I opened the computer, it was DTM
The software is Ableton Live
But what I want to make now is a gramophone
Party tricks in a circle
In a band I started on a whim
For some reason, I'm just a lowly musician now

Dancing Edison self-esteem
Singing Edison self-respect
Dancing Edison self-esteem
Singing Edison self-respect

Inspiration from 1% of the ideas I get by watching YouTube
Communication of inventors connected through SNS
Posts aimed at being Instagrammable
Gathering information through web news
Without a doubt, what's coming in the future
is motion pictures

If I have time to dance, I want to invent
If I have time to sing, I want to invent
I want to kick away live bookings and invent
I will become such an inventor king

Dancing Edison self-esteem
Singing Edison self-respect
Dancing Edison self-esteem
Singing Edison self-respect

scenes.description: Shirogane Noel performs an acoustic piano version of the song 'ours'. The stage visuals change to a large moon. Credit information shows the song title 'ours (Acoustic & Piano ver)', and credits for lyrics, music, and arrangement.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
今日もこのまま
さよならじゃないよ
手をとってくれたなら

秘密も眠りにつくような夜に
君を連れていくよ

それは例えば
遠く離れていたって
手をつないでいられるような
奇跡のような
話をしよう
窓は開けておいて

今日までを思い出して
一つ一つ並べたら
明日の雨が気になりだして
どうも眠れないみたいだ

変わりたくないことや
変わらなきゃいけないことも
少し忘れたまま
窓の外を眺めていたんだ

あぁ
雨が降り出すその前に
君のところまで
行けるような気がして

目を閉じてみたんだ
そしてこのまま
遠くへといこう

手をとってくれるかな
秘密も眠りにつくような夜を
君と泳いでいくよ

街の明かりが消えるたびに笑って
路地裏で抱き合おう
馬鹿みたいな話をしよう
窓は開けておいて
聞こえる？

聞こえる？

愛おしいことや
失くせないものを
教えてくれたのは
今日みたいな

夜を重ねて
織り上げてきた
私たちに響く音

夜が来るたびに
心が躍ってしまうのは
また一つ
重なっていくから
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Like this today
It's not goodbye
If you take my hand

In a night where even secrets
Fall into slumber
I will take you with me

It's for example
Even if we were far apart
Like we could hold hands
And have a story
Like a miracle
Let's talk
Leave the window open

Thinking back to today
If we lined them up one by one
I start to worry about tomorrow's rain
Seems like I can't sleep at all

Things I don't want to change
And things I have to change
While forgetting them a little
I was gazing out the window

Ah
Before the rain starts to fall
I felt like I could
Reach where you are

I tried closing my eyes
And just like this
Let's go far away

I wonder if you'll take my hand
In a night where even secrets
Fall into slumber
I will swim with you

Every time the city lights go out, we laugh
Let's embrace in the back alley
Let's tell stories like idiots
Leave the window open
Can you hear it?

Can you hear it?

Beloved things
And things I cannot lose
What taught me that
Was like today

Layering the nights
That we have woven
The sound that resonates within us

Every time the night comes
My heart dances
Because it's layering
One more time
